title: Registered Nurse Resume Examples & Guide (2026)
metaDescription: Top Registered Nurse resume examples and ATS guide. Copy premium LaTeX template code, find industry-standard ATS skills, and write high-impact bullet points.

summaryExamples.title: New Graduate Nurse
summaryExamples.text: Compassionate and detail-oriented nursing graduate with clinical training in acute care and ICU environments. Adept at patient monitoring, treatment administration, and charting. Committed to delivering evidence-based patient-centric care.

summaryExamples.title: Mid Level Registered Nurse
summaryExamples.text: Registered Nurse with 4+ years of dedicated experience in fast-paced emergency rooms and critical care units. Skilled in patient triage, emergency life support, and multi-disciplinary coordination. Achieved a 95% patient satisfaction rating.

summaryExamples.title: Clinical Nurse Manager
summaryExamples.text: Nurse Manager with 9+ years of leadership in medical-surgical floors and hospital administration. Expert in staff scheduling, compliance management, and clinical quality protocols. Led a nursing department of 40+ staff maintaining high clinical safety ratings.

points: Monitored vital signs and administered medications to up to 6 acute care patients per shift, maintaining 100% compliance with hospital safety standards.
Coordinated patient discharge planning protocols with physicians, physical therapists, and family care partners, cutting readmission rates by 12%.
Documented detailed patient chart metrics using Electronic Health Record (EHR) platforms in strict alignment with HIPAA regulations.
Led patient triage operations in emergency departments, prioritizing urgent care needs to optimize hospital admission workflows.
Participated in emergency life support protocols (ACLS/BLS), stabilizing critical patients during trauma occurrences.

faqs.question: Should nursing resumes include list of certifications at the top?
faqs.answer: Yes. Nursing licenses (e.g. RN, NP) and certifications (BLS, ACLS) are critical gating requirements. Listing them at the top of the resume helps both ATS systems and recruiters verify credentials instantly.

faqs.question: What is Epic EHR and should it be listed?
faqs.answer: Epic is the most widely used Electronic Health Record platform in major healthcare networks. Stating proficiency in Epic or Cerner shows recruiters that you need minimal system training.
